headings.title: Commerce and Foreign Trade
headings.subtitle: Regulations Relating to Commerce and Foreign Trade
headings.chapter: Bureau of Industry and Security, Department of Commerce
headings.part: Control Policy: End-User and End-Use Based
headings.section: Restrictions on certain rocket systems (including ballistic missiles, space launch vehicles and sounding rockets) and unmanned aerial vehicles (including cruise missiles, target drones and reconnaissance drones) end-uses.

results.full_text_excerpt: to, cruise missiles, target drones and reconnaissance drones. (b) Additional prohibition
